title: Viners Marple 20 Piece Cutlery Set Stainless Steel, Mirror Polished Finish Includes Steak Knives, Table Knives, Forks, Spoons Rust-Resistant, Dishwasher Safe – Ideal for Home, Party, Restaurant
availability_text: Only 2 left in stock (more on the way).
features: 20 PIECE CUTLERY SET | Includes 4 table knives, 4 steak knives, 4 table forks, 4 teaspoons, and 4 dessert spoons—perfect for everyday dining and special occasions.
PREMIUM STAINLESS STEEL | Made from high-quality 18.0 stainless steel with a polished mirror finish, ensuring durability and long-lasting performance.
ELEGANT TEARDROP DESIGN | Features a contemporary curved shape with handle detailing, offering a modern take on a timeless classic.
RUST-RESISTANT & DISHWASHER SAFE | Designed for convenience, this cutlery set is easy to clean and built to resist rust and corrosion.
IDEAL FOR ANY OCCASION | Suitable for home dining, dinner parties, and restaurants, making it a stylish and practical addition to any table.

VINERS | Viners has existed for over 110 years and has become a much-loved British brand and household name, steeped in heritage. We pride ourselves on delivering excellence - elegant, robust cutlery.
